km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin於1171年出生在英國。她和Ralph Waldgrave至少有1個兒子。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin于1171年出生在英国。她和Ralph Waldgrave至少有1个儿子。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Guerin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Andre, Dominique, Aime, Alain, Arsene, Benoit, Francois, Gilles.

French (Guérin) and Irish (of French Huguenot origin): from the ancient Germanic personal name Warino, Latinized as Guarinus, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France, partly as a result of the popularity of the Carolingian lay Guérin de Montglave. This was the name of several Huguenot families who came to England as refugees at different times in the 16th and 17th centuries. The surname became established as a surname in Ireland (County Limerick) as early as the 16th century. Compare Garin , Garing , Gearing , Geren , Geron , Gerren , Geurin , Guerrant , and Ward .
Italian (Friuli Venezia Giulia): variant of   Guerino  .

variants.name: Guerrant
meanings: In some cases possibly also French (Seine-Maritime): variant of Guerrand, a nickname for a belligerent person or alternatively for a valiant soldier, derived from guerrer ‘to fight’. The surname Guerrant is very rare in France.

History: Daniel Guérin/Guerrant from Saint-Nazaire-sur-Charente in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie L'Orange in Saint-Nazaire in 1697, died in Goochland, VA, in 1721. His name is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gearing
meanings: English (Sussex and London): perhaps a nickname from Middle English gering, apparently with the sense ‘lecher; glutton’.
English (of French Huguenot origin): Anglicized form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
Americanized form of German   Gehring   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname (compare e.g.   Gahring   and   Garing  ).

variants.name: Geren
meanings: Shortened form of the biblical name Keren-happuch, borne by the third of Job's daughters (Job 42:14). The name meant ‘horn of eye-paint’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Garin
meanings: Of Celtic origin, but uncertain ultimate derivation; it first appears in French sources as Gauvain. The name is borne in the Arthurian romances by one of the knights of the Round Table (more familiar in English versions as Sir Gawain ). It was still in use in the north of England as late as the early 18th century and never died out in Scotland, whence it was reintroduced to England from the early 20th century. It is now very widely used in England, Wales, and elsewhere in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin was born in 1171, in England. She had at least 1 son with Ralph Waldgrave. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin est née en 1171, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ralph Waldgrave. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin wurde 1171 in England geboren. Sie hatte mit Ralph Waldgrave mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin è nata il nel 1171 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ralph Waldgrave. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Guerin Warinは1171年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女はRalph Waldgraveとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin(은)는 1171년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Ralph Waldgrave(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin nasceu em 1171, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ralph Waldgrave. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin родилась в 1171 г. в местности Англия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ralph Waldgrave. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Guerin Warin nació en 1171, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ralph Waldgrave. Murió en su pueblo.
